title: Planner Pouch Pre-Sale is On!
excerpt: We are bursting with excitement over here 💕 This has been in the works since last summer and it's finally here! Well, almost... The new Planner Pouch is now available for pre-order!! We designed it so it’s perfectly sized to…
body:
We are bursting with excitement over here 💕  This has been in the works since last summer and it's finally here! Well, almost... The new Planner Pouch is now available for pre-order!! 

We designed it so it’s perfectly sized to fit your favorite supplies including pens, stickers, and even an A5 bullet journal! And for those who asked, traveler's notebooks also fit in it! Use it for planning and memory-keeping on the go - or whatever you want - and fill it with all the good stuff.

Planner pouches will begin shipping at the end of February, but all pre-orders placed before 2/20 will receive the cutest mini rainbow washi tape!

If you have any questions, leave them below and I will try and shoot a YouTube video with the answers. I can't wait to see how you put your own planner pouch to use!
